g.text: L1 — Supply & regulation · tank pressure → 60 psi at PRV-1
L4 — Poofer supply · tank pressure → 30 psi at PRV-2
set 30 psi · tank-pressure feed for fast refill ·
L4b — Poofer accumulator & discharge · 30 psi (accumulator MAOP 250 psi)
AC-1: hangs on its existing NGT boss through a custom machined adapter — no welds,
no vessel modification · requal stamp expired: interior inspected
L3 — Main bush branch (one of 3) · 60 psi
L3r — Standby tip run (one of 3) · 60 psi
every 1/4 in branch ends in one of these ·
